name: FlowMagic (template auto-gating)
description: Applies a TRAINED flowMagic template to auto-gate a population. flowMagic is supervised: train a template from manually gated samples (magic_template_train) first, then this plugin runs the predict step and returns polygon gates.

requires.notes: flowMagic pulls heavy deps (caret, randomForest, sf, concaveman, sp, doParallel) plus Bioconductor flowWorkspace.
